ddls:
CREATE TABLE "resource_types" (
  "resource_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource type */,
  "resource_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource type (e.g., book, audiobook, multimedia) */,
  "resource_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the resource type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the resource */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the resource (e.g., HTML, AUDIO, None) */,
  "collection_size" TEXT /* Size of the collection (if applicable) */,
  "access_cost" TEXT /* Access cost or cost structure */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or information about the resource */,
  "resource_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource type */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date the resource was published */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the resource was last updated */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the resource */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the resource */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Content type of the resource (e.g., historical, educational) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_resource_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_type_id") REFERENCES resource_types ("resource_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_tags" (
  "resource_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource tag */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being tagged */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_tags_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, faculty, researcher, general public) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role being granted permission */,
  "resource_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource type being accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access granted (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_resource_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_type_id") REFERENCES resource_types ("resource_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the resource */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method of access (e.g., web, mobile app) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)
